query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Flowing streaks of pink, white, green, and deep brown tones sweep diagonally across the frame in overlapping ribbons of color.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Flowing streaks of pink, white, green, and deep brown tones sweep diagonally across the frame in overlapping ribbons of color, the entire image rendered as an abstract blur through intentional motion during exposure so that no distinct subject resolves and the photograph dissolves into pure gesture and chromatic movement.
